calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-093 z_beta heartbeat modulation: BETA_MOD_ON vs OFF, matched seeds [42,123]
items.note: EXP-0011 -- multi-seed replication of EXQ-097b PASS. 2x seeds [42,123] x 2x conditions = 4 cells. 500 warmup + 40 eval eps each. C1: Pearson r>=0.15 both seeds; C3: direction consistent.

items.title: ARC-024 harm-benefit opposing gradient discriminative pair: GRADIENT_PAIR vs FLAT_CONTROL, seeds [42,123]
items.note: EXP-0014 -- full discriminative pair. 2 matched seeds [42,123]. Tests BOTH harm gradient (C1) and benefit gradient (C2) arms of ARC-024, plus opposing cosine test (C3). 400 warmup + 40 eval eps x 200 steps. Extends EXQ-107 (FAIL C1 gap=0.003) with benefit arm, reduced threshold (0.04), and 2x warmup.

items.title: SD-007 reafference matched-seed discriminative pair: REAF_ON vs REAF_OFF, seeds [42,123,456]
items.note: EXP-0015 -- thorough multi-seed discriminative pair. 3 matched seeds [42,123,456] x 2 conditions = 6 cells. Phase 1: LSTM predictor (600 epochs, 40 collect eps, C1 R2>=0.10). Phase 2: 300 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps each. 4 pre-registered criteria: C1 predictor quality, C2 selectivity lift>=15%, C3 consistency all 3 seeds, C4 data quality>=30 approach events 2/3 seeds. Supersedes EXQ-111 (2 seeds, 150 warmup).

items.title: MECH-090 beta gate committed dynamics: GATE_ON vs GATE_OFF x 2 seeds
items.note: EXP-0016: matched-seed discriminative pair. BETA_GATE_ON vs BETA_GATE_OFF x seeds [42,123]. 5 criteria: C1 hold_conc>=0.60 both seeds, C2 release_conc>=0.50 >=1 seed, C3 ablation hold_conc<0.40 both seeds, C4 n_committed>=50, C5 no fatal errors.

items.title: ARC-018 viability map: VIABILITY_MAP_ON vs VIABILITY_MAP_ABLATED x 2 seeds
items.note: EXP-0017: matched-seed discriminative pair. VIABILITY_MAP_ON (residue accumulation + hippocampal proposals) vs VIABILITY_MAP_ABLATED (no terrain, random action). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 harm_reduction>=15%, C2 residue_events_min>=20, C3 consistent both seeds, C4 n_harm_min>=20, C5 active_centers_min>=5. 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps.

items.title: MECH-095 agency attribution: AGENCY_ATTRIBUTION_ON vs AGENCY_ATTRIBUTION_ABLATED x 2 seeds
items.note: EXP-0019: matched-seed discriminative pair. AGENCY_ATTRIBUTION_ON (AgencyComparator: efference-copy mismatch comparator) vs AGENCY_ATTRIBUTION_ABLATED (direct z_self_delta + z_world fusion). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 auc_delta>=0.05, C2 auc_ON>=0.60, C3 consistent both seeds, C4 min_contacts>=20, C5 mm_env/mm_agent>=1.05 (diagnostic). 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps.

items.title: MECH-089 theta-gamma integration: THETA_INTEGRATION_ON vs THETA_INTEGRATION_ABLATED x 2 seeds
items.note: EXP-0020: matched-seed discriminative pair. THETA_INTEGRATION_ON (ThetaBuffer mean z_world to E3, theta_k=2) vs THETA_INTEGRATION_ABLATED (raw most-recent z_world to E3, same E3 update rate). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 harm_auc_delta>=0.05, C2 harm_auc_ON>=0.60, C3 consistent both seeds, C4 min_harm_steps>=20, C5 mean_batch_var>=1e-5 (diagnostic). Redesign of EXQ-066 (theta_k=4 was too coarse, degraded E3). theta_k=2 with matched E3 update rate isolates averaging effect. 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps.

items.title: MECH-102 harm escalation gradient: HARM_EVAL_ON vs HARM_EVAL_ABLATED x 2 seeds
items.note: EXP-0021: matched-seed discriminative pair. HARM_EVAL_ON (E3 harm_eval_head trained on harm_signal labels) vs HARM_EVAL_ABLATED (harm_eval_head frozen at random init). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 grad_delta>=0.15, C2 gradient_score_ON>=0.65, C3 consistent both seeds, C4 min_approach_contact_pairs>=20, C5 escalation_gap>=0.05 (diagnostic). Gradient score = P(approach_harm_score < contact_harm_score). 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps. Phase detection: approach=harm_signal in (-0.015,0), contact=harm_signal<=-0.015.

items.title: MECH-033 kernel chaining interface: KERNEL_CHAIN_ON vs KERNEL_CHAIN_ABLATED x 2 seeds
items.note: EXP-0023: matched-seed discriminative pair. KERNEL_CHAIN_ON (HippocampalModule CEM in action-object space, E2 action_object kernels chained across horizon, terrain prior + residue scoring) vs KERNEL_CHAIN_ABLATED (random candidates, E3 selects best via one-step E2 world_forward -- no kernel chaining). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 4 pre-registered criteria: C1 harm_reduction_delta>=0.03, C2 relative_reduction>=0.15, C3 consistent both seeds, C4 min_contacts_ablated>=20. 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps. Replicates EXQ-055 PASS with proper matched-seed discriminative design.

items.title: SD-011 harm_obs_a temporal persistence: episode-reset fix validation
items.note: Fix: harm_obs_a_ema moved from reset() to __init__() in CausalGridWorldV2. EXQ-106 C4 FAIL (autocorr=0.070) was caused by episode-reset wiping the EMA each episode (sawtooth). With persistent EMA, expected autocorr ~ (1-0.05)^10 ~ 0.60 >> threshold 0.30. Smoke test confirmed PASS 4/4 (autocorr=0.511). 4 criteria: C1 grid_high>2.5x grid_low, C3 raw density responsive, C4 autocorr_lag10>0.30, C5 no errors. 5 seeds x 500 steps x 2 conditions.

items.title: ARC-029: COMMITTED_MODE_ON vs COMMITTED_MODE_ABLATED x stable/volatile x 2 seeds
items.note: EXP-0085: matched-seed discriminative pair. COMMITTED_MODE_ON (BG beta gate active, agent trained to committed state) vs COMMITTED_MODE_ABLATED (gate disabled: running_var forced > commit_threshold each step) x stable (drift=0.0) vs volatile (drift=0.4, interval=3). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions x 2 envs = 8 cells. 6 pre-registered criteria: C1 harm_gap_stable>=0.0001 (both seeds), C2 gap_volatile<gap_stable (both seeds), C3 gap_ratio<=0.90 (both seeds), C4 gate active in ON condition, C5 ablation complete, C6 no fatal errors. 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps. Strengthens EXQ-063 PASS (5/5, conf=0.774) with canonical matched seeds.

items.title: MECH-104: SURPRISE_GATE_ON vs SURPRISE_GATE_ABLATED x 2 seeds (volatility gate discriminative pair)
items.note: EXP-0086: matched-seed discriminative pair. SURPRISE_GATE_ON (surprise gate active: unexpected harm spikes running_variance) vs SURPRISE_GATE_ABLATED (gate disabled: no variance impulse on harm). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 6 pre-registered criteria: C1 ON delta_var_unexpected>=0.005 (both seeds), C2 ON delta_var_expected<0.002 (selective, both seeds), C3 ABLATED delta_var_unexpected<0.002 (baseline flat, both seeds), C4 (ON-ABLATED) discriminative_delta>=0.004 (both seeds), C5 n_unexpected_harm_ON>=10 (both seeds), C6 no fatal errors. spike_magnitude=0.05 surprise_threshold=0.02. Extends EXQ-064 PASS (single seed, 5/5) with matched-seed discriminative ablation design. Route-2 MECH-104 validation. 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps.

items.title: MECH-030: REPLAY_ON vs REPLAY_ABLATED x 2 seeds (sleep consolidation discriminative pair)
items.note: EXP-0025 / EVB-0019: matched-seed discriminative pair. REPLAY_ON (online updates + post-episode batch consolidation: n_replay_steps=10, replay_batch=32) vs REPLAY_ABLATED (online updates only, no consolidation). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 gap_replay_on>=0.04 (both seeds), C2 per-seed delta (ON-ABLATED)>=0.02 (both seeds), C3 gap_ablated>=0.0 (ablation learns something), C4 n_harm_eval_min>=20, C5 no fatal errors. Tests MECH-030 V3 proxy: does offline batch consolidation improve harm_eval_head quality beyond online-only training? Functional restatement of MECH-092 (offline batch consolidation during idle periods). 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps, size=6, 4 hazards, nav_bias=0.35, alpha_world=0.9.

items.title: MECH-103: FUSION_ON vs FUSION_ABLATED x 2 seeds (multimodal exteroceptive fusion discriminative pair)
items.note: EXP-0025 / EVB-0020: matched-seed discriminative pair. FUSION_ON (world_obs extended with informative auditory channel AUD_DIM=8: hazard-tone + resource-tone signals) vs FUSION_ABLATED (same architecture but zero-padded extra channel). Seeds [42,123] x 2 conditions = 4 cells. 5 pre-registered criteria: C1 gap_fusion_on>=0.04 (both seeds), C2 per-seed delta (ON-ABLATED)>=0.02 (both seeds), C3 gap_ablated>=0.0, C4 n_harm_eval_min>=20, C5 no fatal errors. Tests MECH-103: does informative complementary modality improve z_world harm discrimination over single-modality? Same encoder architecture in both arms (extended world_obs_dim) isolates the modality information contribution. 400 warmup + 50 eval eps x 200 steps, size=6, 4 hazards, nav_bias=0.40, alpha_world=0.9.
